title: KB2005_14.0.0.501(EX01) is available
description:
New version: KB2005_14.0.0.501(EX01)

A system update is available.

System

• Reduces power consumption to extend battery life in some scenarios.

• Fixes an issue that might cause some apps to crash.

• Fixes a display issue with the status bar.

• Adds a switch for year/month/day views in Settings.

• Fixes a display issue that might occur on the Lock screen when the device is disconnected from the charger.

• Integrates the March 2024 Android security patch to enhance system security.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1
